channel.title: Light: Science & Applications
channel.description: Filtered papers from Light: Science & Applications

item.title: Two-terminal β-Ga<sub>2</sub>O<sub>3</sub> photo-synapse for diversified in-sensor computing via self-trapped holes engineering
item.description:
Light: Science & Applications, Published online: 29 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41377-026-02298-2

β-Ga2O3 photo-synapses based on self-trapped holes engineering exhibited a low weight update nonlinearity of 0.42, thereby enabling multiple machine vision tasks from low-level image classification to high-level motion recognition.

item.title: High-speed and high-sensitivity multi-gas detection based on parallel heterodyne LITES sensor
item.description:
Light: Science & Applications, Published online: 29 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41377-026-02385-4

High-speed and high-sensitivity multi-gas detection based on parallel heterodyne LITES sensor

item.title: Expanded field of view light-field extended-reality displays with metalens array
item.description:
Light: Science & Applications, Published online: 29 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41377-026-02266-w

XR 3D display prototype achieves VAC-free experience via unique heterogeneous metalens array, offering extended FOV for next-gen AI glasses and outdoor navigation in smart wearables.
